extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won from the wheel, timing his sprint perfectly to overtake MILANO who went from 250m out on the uphill finish.
tactical_patterns: MILANO attacked from 250m on uphill finish with big gap, but went too early without leadout support.
Alpecin-Deceuninck controlled peloton all day without setting tempo, saving energy for final positioning sprint.
Final left-hand corner 350m out with decreasing radius caused EF crash, showing course recon advantage critical.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: demonstrated superior uphill sprint timing and power, waited longest among contenders on steep gradient finish
rider_signals.MILANO Jonathan: positive: showed unexpected diesel engine strength holding solo effort 250m uphill, lacks only final top-end speed
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: deliberately avoided intermediate sprint bonus seconds, contrary to Tour de France behavior pattern
rider_signals.SEPULVEDA Eduardo: neutral: won breakaway KOM points uncontested with peloton only 25 seconds back, suggesting minimal GC threat perception
